runTitle: Local Next.js Webpack Dev Fallback Stabilization
coveredSurfaces: OTel data loader server-only node dynamic import compatibility
skippedSurfaces: storage-nfs-dc1-01 performance tab hover tooltip visual verification
notes: This run is non-counting and records local development runtime recovery evidence only.
The prior local dev blocked state in QA-20260508-0421 and QA-20260508-0422 was narrowed to WSL2 /mnt/d Turbopack instability plus webpack client build handling of server-only node: dynamic imports.
Local dev scripts now default to next dev --webpack for this WSL2 /mnt/d setup, with node_modules symlinked to the ext4 path /home/sky-note/wsl-node-modules/openmanager-ai-project/node_modules.
src/data/otel-data/index.ts keeps webpackIgnore on server-only node:fs/promises and node:path dynamic imports so the webpack client build does not fail with UnhandledSchemeError.

Validated commands: npm run dev:readiness:webpack -- --timeout=120 --path=/api/version, npm run dev:readiness:webpack -- --timeout=120 --path=/dashboard, npm run type-check, npm run lint, npm run test:quick, npm run docs:budget, npm run docs:ai-consistency, git diff --check.
Remaining product QA is the actual Nivo visual hover/highlight check on storage-nfs-dc1-01; this run only proves the local dev runtime can reach the dashboard again.

links.label: GitLab pipeline 2509591206
links.note: Pushed HEAD pipeline for fix(dev): stabilize local webpack dev fallback completed successfully.
